message:
fix(server): Propagate session state through nested calls

Session state was incorrectly using SessionState::new() for nested
RouterResourceReader and RouterToolCaller instances. This meant that
nested resource reads and tool calls would not see session state set
by their parent handlers.

Fixed by cloning and passing the original session_state instead.

Added two new tests to verify session state propagation:
- test_session_state_propagates_through_nested_reads
- test_session_state_propagates_through_nested_tool_calls

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
